[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100000 1
1 11000000 2
2 00000010 1
3 10000110 3
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a

01 10 00000000 a match 4 5 6 7
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 10000000 1
34 43 10000010 2
45 54 10100000 2
56 65 01100001 3
67 76 01000011 3
70 07 00000101 2

02 20 00000100 1
13 31 00000000 a match 4 5 6 7

35 53 10000000 1

71 17 01000000 1

47 74 10000110 3 match 3
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 01100000 2
72 27 11000100 3

37 73 10000010 2
